title: Yoneda products in the Cartan-Eilenberg change of rings spectral sequence with applications to 𝐵𝑃_{∗}(𝐵𝑂(𝑛))
journal: Transactions of the American Mathematical Society
abstract:
Yoneda product structure is defined on a Cartan-Eilenberg change of rings spectral sequence. Application is made to a factorization theorem for the

-term of the Adams spectral sequence for Brown-Peterson homology of the classifying spaces
